body.title: Consequence check: queue_view.py compiled inference
body.result: CLEAR: both views produce correct grouped output; skill files are one-liners; no edge cases found
body.intention: I intend that this ticket verifies the compiled-inference gain was real and the skill output is correct.
body.description:
**What changed:** /mytickets and /opentickets now call queue_view.py instead of cc_queue.py + bash pipes.
**Predicted unintended effects:** queue_view.py may silently miss edge-case ticket states that the old grep approach caught (or didn't catch). The compiled output format may diverge from what CC expects in the skill's prose description.
**Signals to watch:** Do /mytickets or /opentickets produce wrong output after the switch? Does any ticket fail to appear in a view it should? Is the output format stable across queue changes?
**Gate condition:** Fires after T-skill-queue-view-script closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Run both skills; compare output to expected shape; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close.
**Completion criteria:** Both skills run correctly; outcome annotated and ticket closed.
